observations.statement: The contract defines POST /api/v2/search/spending_over_time/ and says it supports advanced search filtering for spending subsets.
The contract documents required group and filters request fields and optional subawards and spending_level fields.
The contract documents canonical group values calendar_year, fiscal_year, quarter, and month.
The contract documents response group, spending_level, results, and messages fields.
The current raw MCP profile exposes top-level body fields filters, group, spending_level, and subawards.
The current raw MCP profile does not expose nested AdvancedFilterObject members as separate searchable request fields.
Source code maps group aliases cy, fy, q, and m to canonical response group names.
Source validation requires filters and defaults spending_level to transactions.
Source validation includes program_activities object-key minimum logic.

response.bodyShape: object with group, results array length 2, spending_level, messages

messages: For searches, time period start and end dates are currently limited to an earliest date of 2007-10-01.
The 'subawards' field will be deprecated in the future. Set 'spending_level' to 'subawards' instead.

observations.statement: The baseline request succeeded with group fiscal_year and returned two fiscal-year result buckets.
Omitting spending_level returned spending_level transactions.
The live response includes messages about the 2007-10-01 search date limit and subawards deprecation.

response.bodyShape: object with group fiscal_year and 19 result rows

observations.statement: The undocumented group alias fy is accepted and canonicalized to response group fiscal_year.
Keyword-only filters are accepted and returned a broad multi-year trend.

response.bodyShape: object with quarter group and 4 result rows

observations.statement: spending_level subawards is accepted with quarter grouping.
Subaward result rows observed Contract and Grant columns but not Direct, Idv, Loan, or Other columns in the sample.
Invalid group value bad returned HTTP 400 and disclosed the live valid values, including undocumented aliases.
The staged spending_over_time contract documents filters.place_of_performance_scope and filters.recipient_scope as optional AdvancedFilterObject members with allowed values domestic and foreign.

source.title: Structured reviewer report for RT1 map-plus-trend scope alignment

observations.statement: The reviewer found that listRequestFields for v2__search__spending_over_time did not expose filters.place_of_performance_scope before this repair.

The reviewer validated and live-called spending_over_time with filters.place_of_performance_scope set to domestic; the request succeeded and changed the monthly series, including month 4 from 24181924884.48 to 22614104423.11 and month 9 from 51275083431.73 to 48684560921.6.

The reviewer also used spending_by_geography guidance documenting domestic default behavior for state, county, and district geography layers, so same-scope dashboards should set the matching location-scope filter explicitly.

source.title: Structured reviewer report for RT1 map-plus-trend scope alignment

observations.statement: The reviewer live-called spending_over_time with group month, filters.award_type_codes ['A','B','C'], filters.time_period 2024-01-01 through 2024-06-30, and filters.place_of_performance_scope domestic; the response returned six monthly rows with time_period.fiscal_year='2024' and month values '4' through '9'.
Because that request asked for Jan-Jun 2024, the returned month values 4 through 9 show that month-grouped results use fiscal month numbering within fiscal_year rather than calendar month numbering.
